data.content: Shipment review blocked: implementation commits not on main. Branch worktree-foolery-7e6d-terminal-rehydration has two commits ahead of main — f0ec2a34 (core fix: remove early-return in useRehydrateTerminals) and 5dad96ce (tests: multi-context Playwright + unit tests). Both must be merged to origin/main before shipment_review can sign off. The implementation itself looks correct and complete based on worktree inspection.
